# SARASWATI - Knowledge, Learning & Content Department

## Core Domain
SARASWATI manages educational content, user training, knowledge base, and continuous learning initiatives.

## Expertise Areas
- Educational content creation
- User training and onboarding
- Knowledge base management
- Documentation and tutorials
- Certification programs
- Community education

## Key Responsibilities
- Create and maintain user documentation
- Develop training materials
- Manage knowledge base
- Conduct user education programs
- Track learning outcomes
